fresh_facts.claim: The US deployed approximately 2,500 Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit aboard the USS Tripoli to the Middle East on March 14, 2026.
US and Israeli strikes on Iran continued for nearly two weeks starting February 28, 2026, targeting over 15,000 military targets.
President Trump announced US strikes on Iran's Kharg Island, a key oil export hub, on March 13, 2026, via social media.
A missile struck a helipad in the US Embassy compound in Baghdad, with video showing smoke but no immediate casualties reported.
A drone strike in northern Iraq on March 13, 2026, killed a French soldier.
Iran persists in attacking Persian Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure, with threats targeting the Strait of Hormuz.
Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian discussed de-escalation with Egypt's Abdel-Fattah el-Sissi on March 13, 2026, emphasizing relations with Arab states.
Mojtaba Khamenei was officially named Supreme Leader by Iran's Assembly of Experts on March 8, 2026, following his father Ali Khamenei's death on February 28, 2026.
Mojtaba Khamenei made his first public statement as Supreme Leader on March 12, 2026.
An elite Iranian 'NOPO' counterterrorism unit was repurposed to protect Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei from hostage rescue roles.
US and Israeli strikes on Iran targeted fuel depots, refineries, and desalination plants, causing black smoke over Tehran as of March 9, 2026.
Iranian Security forces increased street presence to suppress dissent amid US strikes and mobilized supporters for counter-demonstrations on March 14, 2026.
Nationwide protests in Iran began on December 28, 2025, with the government implementing internet blackouts.
Trump expressed opposition to Mojtaba Khamenei as successor around March 5, 2026, before Iran's Assembly of Experts appointed him.
Iran-aligned militias stepped up rocket and drone attacks on US bases in the Middle East as of March 14, 2026.
Trump discussed the Iran conflict with China's Xi Jinping on March 13-14, 2026.
The US is considering waiving Jones Act requirements in response to Iranian disruption of Persian Gulf shipping.
Israeli strikes on Hezbollah in Lebanon intensified on Friday, March 13, 2026, during the broader US-Israeli campaign against Iran.

regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli bombing campaign has expanded to over 15,000 targets including Kharg Island oil infrastructure and critical economic facilities, while the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit (2,500 Marines) has been deployed as the first significant ground force. Mojtaba Khamenei, newly installed as Supreme Leader on March 8, maintains regime cohesion through elite security redeployment and defiant public statements, but faces cascading military degradation, economic disruption from infrastructure strikes, and escalating ground force presence.
regime_fall.last_major_event: President Trump announced fresh US strikes on Iran's Kharg Island on March 13, 2026, and confirmed deployment of the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit as the first significant ground force into Iran on March 14, with indication of potential further Army unit mobilization.
